{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Dragonslayer
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Dragonslayer]] is estimated to be an [[Archmage]] in illusion magic inside an [[Aethertech]] war-mech.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dragonslayer]] is a criminal who operates a war-mech with one red eye.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c24">''The Engineer'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
